name: Addrevenue
known_limitations: Experimental: Addrevenue API response shapes (field names, pagination, amount unit) are inferred from the public developer reference and have not been validated against a live account; transformers read defensively and preserve the raw payload on rawNetworkData.
Amount unit is assumed to be the major currency unit (e.g. SEK, not öre) with a per-row currency field; this has not been confirmed against a live account.
